title: Damage Optimization│傷害優化
description: This datapack allows certain types of damage to bypass cooldown.│這個資料包使一些傷害可以無視受擊後傷害免疫。
body:
# Function│功能
If the damage type is 
```indirect_magic,magic,lightning_bolt,thorns,sonic_boom,wither```│如果傷害類型是```indirect_magic,magic,lightning_bolt,thorns,sonic_boom,wither```（間接魔法、魔法、閃電束、尖刺、伏守者音波、凋零），該傷害可無視受擊冷卻。
, the damage can bypass cooldown.
# Why do this?│為甚麼要這樣做？
- An instant health potion restores one life each time it is splashed, so why does an instant harming potion have to wait 0.5 seconds to cool down?│立即治療藥水砸中一次回復一次生命，為甚麼立即傷害藥水就要等待0.5秒冷卻？
- A trident with the Channeling enchantment does 8 damage when it hits a creature, so what about lightning damage? It will be immune.│喚雷三叉戟擊中生物時造成8傷害，那麼閃電傷害呢？它會被免疫。
# Known Issue│已知問題
Due to the vanilla mechanics, installing this datapack will cause Wither Rose to deal 1 Wither damage per tick. To fix this, please install the [Wither Rose Tweak](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wither-rose-tweak).│由於原版機制的關係，在安裝此數據包之後會導致凋零玫瑰每tick都會造成1點凋零傷害，欲解決此問題，請安裝[凋零玫瑰調整](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wither-rose-tweak)。
